label: New Relic
description: Query metrics, traces, logs, and alerts from your New Relic observability platform.

form.title: Connect New Relic
form.subtitle: Paste your User API key to give Anton access to your New Relic account.

methods.label: User API Key
methods.description: Paste a personal User API key (NRAK-…) from your New Relic profile. Quickest path — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Get your New Relic User API key

1. Log in to [one.newrelic.com](https://one.newrelic.com).
2. Click your **avatar / name** in the bottom-left corner → **API keys**.
3. Click **Create a key** (or find an existing User key).
4. Make sure the **Key type** is **User** (starts with `NRAK-`). Ingest keys won't work here.
5. Copy the key — it is shown only once at creation time. If you missed it, create a new one.
6. Paste the key into **User API Key** below.
7. Select your **Region** — choose **EU** if your account is on `one.eu.newrelic.com`, otherwise leave it as **US**.

## Notes

- User API keys inherit your personal permissions. If your role lacks access to certain accounts or data, Anton will see the same restrictions.
- Rotate by deleting the key in the API keys panel and pasting a fresh one into Anton.
- See [New Relic API keys docs](https://docs.newrelic.com/docs/apis/intro-apis/new-relic-api-keys/) for full background.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: User API Key
fields.description: Found in one.newrelic.com → your avatar → API keys. Must be a User key (NRAK-…), not an Ingest/License key.

fields.name: region
fields.label: Region
fields.description: US accounts use one.newrelic.com; EU accounts use one.eu.newrelic.com.

fields.name: account_id
fields.label: Account ID
fields.description: Optional. Your numeric New Relic Account ID — visible in the URL after you log in (e.g. one.newrelic.com/accounts/1234567). Required for some NRQL queries.
